title: Automated Digital Certificate Renewal
description: A python script that parses logs and generates new digital certs and installs them onto servers

title: Personal Portfolio
description: A full-stack personal portfolio built with React and FastAPI, containerized with Docker and deployed through automated GitHub Actions workflows. Emphasizes production-ready development practices from local environment to deployment.

title: EXPLORE
description: A location-sharing mobile app built with React Native and Firebase, featuring real-time data, Google Maps integration, and a gamified leaderboard system.

title: Fibonacci Solitaire
description: A card game engine built in C++ that implements a Fibonacci-based solitaire ruleset. Demonstrates core CS fundamentals including OOP, data structures, and build automation via Makefile.
